from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_price_coercion():
    """Test that string prices are coerced to numbers for comparison without TypeError."""
    items = [
        {'name': 'cheap', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'expensive_str', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'medium', 'price': 150}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    assert len(result) == 1, "Should return only items with price > threshold"
    assert result[0]['name'] == 'expensive_str', "Item with string price '200' should pass when it exceeds threshold"
